inputs.businessContext: Enter the number of complete years of age.

businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie die Anzahl der vollendeten Lebensjahre ein.

inputs.businessContext: Enter the number of additional full months beyond the years.

inputs.businessContext: Enter the number of additional days beyond the months.

inputs.businessContext: Enter any additional hours beyond the days.
